de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<Throw>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<Throw>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessExceptionalMethodReturn

    public interface IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn
extends IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<Throw>

    A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a exceptional method return.

    The default implementation is ExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder, ExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.IExecutionNode
